CNC Machining Services

CNC Turning

High-precision CNC turning services for shafts, pins, bushings, and threaded components. Tolerances up to ±0.005mm.

Process Introduction

Precision Turning Technology

Our CNC turning centers utilize state-of-the-art technology to produce cylindrical components with exceptional precision. We handle diameters from 1mm to 500mm with various materials including stainless steel, aluminum, brass, and titanium.

  • 20+ CNC turning lathes with live tooling
  • Swiss-type lathes for micro-precision parts
  • Bar feeder systems for continuous production
  • In-process quality monitoring

Equipment

Our Turning Centers

CNC Lathe

Mazak Quick Turn series with live tooling capability

  • Max turning diameter: 400mm
  • Max turning length: 1000mm
  • Spindle speed: 4000 RPM

Swiss Lathe

Star SR series for precision micro parts

  • Max bar diameter: 32mm
  • 7-axis simultaneous control
  • Precision: ±0.003mm

Multi-Spindle

Index MS series for high-volume production

  • 6 spindles simultaneous
  • Cycle time reduction: 60%
  • Ideal for automotive parts

Product Showcase

Turned Components

Threaded Shafts

Stainless steel, M3-M30

Dowel Pins

Precision ground

Locating Pins

Custom machined

Brass Components

Various fittings
